title: cibotium glaucum
intro: Cibotium glaucum, also known as the 'Tī plant', is a type of fern native to the tropical forests of Hawaii and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cibotium glaucum include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as acting as an antiseptic to prevent infection. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to promote overall well-being and health.
